title: Piglin Gold Trim Protection
description: Piglins ignore players wearing armor with gold trim
body:
Piglin Gold Trim Protection is a simple yet effective mod that changes piglin behavior: while wearing armor with gold accents, piglins will no longer attack the player!

Perfect for exploring the Nether safely or trading with piglins without the risk of sudden attacks.

✨ Features

Peaceful Piglins — Piglins ignore players wearing any armor piece with gold ornamentation

Vanilla-Friendly — No changes to vanilla mechanics besides piglin aggression

Full Armor Support — Works with all armor types that have gold elements

Easy Exploration — Enjoy the Nether without constant threats from piglins
